description: private university in Durham, North Carolina, USA
description_wiki: Duke University is a private research university in Durham, North Carolina, United States.

The global COVID-19 pandemic (also known as the coronavirus pandemic), caused by severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2), began with an outbreak in Wuhan, China, in December 2019.

description: providing clinical health care from a distance through telecommunication and information technology
description_wiki: Telehealth is the use of electronic information and telecommunication technologies to support long-distance clinical health care, patient and professional health-related education, health administration, and public health.This includes data sharing by way of patient portals and electronic medical records.

description: road in New York City and Westchester County, New York, United States
description_wiki: Broadway () is a street and major thoroughfare in the U.S. state of New York.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Virginia, officially the Commonwealth of Virginia, is a state in the Southeastern and Mid-Atlantic regions of the United States between the Atlantic Coast and the Appalachian Mountains.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: North Carolina (  KAYR-ə-LIE-nə) is a state in the Southeastern and South Atlantic regions of the United States.
